name: aionis-core-workspace
description: Aionis Core kernel for learned kickoff, structured handoff, replay, governance, and execution memory.

scripts.docs:check: node scripts/sync-core-path.mjs --check && node scripts/ci/docs-reference-check.mjs && npm run -s docs:build
scripts.packages:release:check: npm run -s aionis-doc:release:check && npm run -s sdk:release:check && npm run -s runtime-core:release:check
scripts.lite:test: node --test scripts/ci/lite-startup-contract.test.mjs scripts/ci/lite-source-scope.test.mjs scripts/ci/lite-release-baseline.test.mjs && npx tsx --test scripts/ci/lite-automation-kernel.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-health-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-error-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-replay-repair-policy.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-replay-governed-learning-projection-route.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-memory-governance-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-anchor-rehydration-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-anchor-rehydration-route.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-memory-lifecycle-route.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-tools-select-route-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-pattern-suppress-route.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-runtime-tool-hints.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-planning-summary.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-replay-anchor.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-replay-learning-projection.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-tools-pattern-anchor.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-governance-shared-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-promote-memory-governance-shared-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-form-pattern-governance-shared-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-governance-operation-runner-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-governance-decision-trace-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-governance-policy-effect-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-governance-runtime-apply-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-governance-runtime-provider-builder.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-governance-provider-factory.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-governance-model-client-factory.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-governance-model-client-http.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-governance-model-client-http-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-governance-adjudication-modules.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-context-build.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-context-runtime-packet-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-execution-native-write-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-execution-introspection-route.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-workflow-write-projection-contract.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-memory-write-workflow-projection-route.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-handoff-workflow-projection-route.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-session-event-workflow-projection-route.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-experience-intelligence-route.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-continuity-review-pack-route.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-evolution-review-pack-route.test.ts scripts/ci/lite-delegation-records-route.test.ts
scripts.core:build: npm run -s core:build:runtime-host && npm run -s core:build:aionis-doc && npm run -s core:build:runtime-core && npm run -s core:build:sdk && npm run -s core:build:internal-sdk
